title: Gog Esque
description: A Celestial Resource Pack made to simulate a similar Style to Botania's Garden Of Glass Skybox.
body:
## **What is Gog Esque?**

Gog Esque is a resource pack I made for the Celestial mod, I made it for the sole reason of wanting to use something like the Gog Skybox mod for versions newer that 1.12 without just getting botania. It's very much so stiched together but have not had any issues with it running on any version of minecraft as long as you have Celestial downloaded.

### Features!
All the star in the sky will glide around but follow the same general direction.
There are a few planets that will float around the sky.
Two Masive Rings that Circle the Planet.
Massive Moon


# **Credit**
All art is made by me and a mix of the reference art by the Celestial Demo packs.
The Idea for the pack came from Botania's Garden of Glass
